name: MSI MAG B860M MORTAR WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-9200(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - Thunderbolt4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Intel 5G LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 - BT 5.4 (B860MMORTARWIFI)
shortName: MSI MAG B860M MORTAR WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851
description: Compact Intel-based Micro-ATX motherboard with LGA 1851 socket and Thunderbolt 4 support for high-speed connectivity.
